extracted_data.description:
On March 15, 2024, the insured vehicle (2019 Honda Civic) was struck from
behind at a red light on Main Street. The rear bumper and trunk sustained
significant damage. A police report was filed at the scene (Report #2024-0315).
Repair estimates have been obtained from two certified auto repair shops.

decision.reason: All required fields present, no inconsistencies detected, claim appears valid.

extracted_data.description:
A severe storm caused flooding in the basement and first floor of the
insured property at 44 Birchwood Lane. Damage includes ruined flooring,
damaged drywall, and loss of personal property including appliances.
Contractor estimates total restoration cost at $15,000.
